skills.name: Install Redis
skills.desc: Learn how to install the Redis server on your local machine.

skills.name: Start Redis Server
skills.desc: Understand how to start the Redis server to begin using it.

skills.name: Connect Using CLI
skills.desc: Connect to Redis using the command-line interface for interaction.

skills.name: Set String Value
skills.desc: Store a string value in Redis using a specific key.

skills.name: Get String Value
skills.desc: Retrieve a string value from Redis by its key.

skills.name: Delete Single Key
skills.desc: Remove a specific key and its value from Redis.

skills.name: Check Key Existence
skills.desc: Verify if a key exists in the Redis database.

skills.name: Set Key Timeout
skills.desc: Set an expiration time for a key in Redis.

skills.name: Increase Integer Value
skills.desc: Increment an integer value stored in Redis by one.

skills.name: Decrease Integer Value
skills.desc: Decrement an integer value stored in Redis by one.

skills.name: Push List Left
skills.desc: Add an element to the left side of a Redis list.

skills.name: Push List Right
skills.desc: Add an element to the right side of a Redis list.

skills.name: Pop List Left
skills.desc: Remove and return an element from the left of a Redis list.

skills.name: Pop List Right
skills.desc: Remove and return an element from the right of a Redis list.

skills.name: Get List Length
skills.desc: Retrieve the number of elements in a Redis list.

skills.name: Get List Range
skills.desc: Fetch a range of elements from a Redis list by index.

skills.name: Add Set Element
skills.desc: Add a unique element to a Redis set.

skills.name: Check Set Membership
skills.desc: Check if an element exists in a Redis set.

skills.name: List Set Members
skills.desc: Retrieve all elements stored in a Redis set.
